name: Red Lobster Garlic Cheese Rolls
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Very finely shredded cheddar cheese
5 lb Box of Bisquick Mix - softened or melted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the shredded cheese, water, and Bisquick.
2. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a non-stick cookie sheet or one covered with aluminum foil. Experiment to determine the size, but aim for rolls about 2 inches in diameter.
3. Bake at 400°F until golden brown (consult the Bisquick box for approximate cooking time).
4. Immediately after removing the rolls from the oven, brush them generously with garlic butter (softened or melted butter mixed with finely diced or crushed garlic).
5. Serve the rolls warm.
Note: The exact number of rolls produced may vary; adjust portion sizes as needed.
